title: Tread Softly
writer: Gerald Verner, Donald Ginsberg, Vivian Cox
actors: Frances Day, Patricia Dainton, John Bentley
plot: The star of a London musical walks out before the curtain up, but the show must go on in a haunted theatre, The Regency. 40 years previously, the star of Hamlet was murdered, and more are dying to keep a dark secret.
